arts.ttl: PSV coach Bosz: “Ball possession crucial against Juventus”
arts.sum: PSV Eindhoven manager Peter Bosz addressed the media ahead of their Champions League clash against Juventus. The Dutch coach expressed his curiosity about the new format of the competition while acknowledging the challenge that lies ahead for his team. “I’m very curious about this new Champions League formula,” Bosz began. “The competition always has its charm, regardless of the format. I’m eager to see how it unfolds.” Turning his attention to the upcoming match, Bosz emphasized the difficulty of the task at hand: “Tomorrow, a tough game awaits us. We’ll face a team of very high caliber, but we’ve trained The post PSV coach Bosz: “Ball possession crucial against Juventus” appeared first on FootItalia.com.
